title: lonchocarpus nitidus var. genuinus
intro: Lonchocarpus nitidus var. genuinus, also known as the 'Pereque', is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, the Lonchocarpus nitidus var. genuinus plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, allowing it to be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Lonchocarpus nitidus var. genuinus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
